Robbery146_x264: A person wearing dark clothing moves through the crowded interior of a vehicle, interacting with others seated nearby. As they move forward, several passengers react by shifting their positions or reaching out toward them. The individual appears to engage physically with at least one other passenger, causing a disturbance among those around them. Some people begin to stand up or lean into the aisle, while others remain seated, observing the unfolding interaction. The central figures become increasingly entangled, with multiple people involved in close proximity, suggesting escalating physical contact. The surrounding passengers appear unsettled, with some looking away or turning their attention elsewhere. The overall atmosphere becomes more chaotic as movement intensifies along the central aisle. Eventually, the initial group disperses slightly, though the core interaction continues with participants still closely engaged.
Assault042_x264: A person riding a bicycle approaches another individual standing near a parked vehicle. The rider appears to make contact with the standing person, causing both to fall to the ground. After the fall, the rider remains on the ground while the other person stands nearby for several moments before moving closer to check on them. A third person walks toward the fallen pair, stopping at some distance before appearing to assess the situation. Over time, more bystanders gather in the background, observing the scene without intervening. The two individuals remain on the ground for an extended period, with minimal movement from either party. Eventually, emergency responders arrive and begin attending to the situation.
Arson041_x264: A person dressed in light-colored clothing stands near a door for several minutes, appearing to interact with the door handle or lock. They then step back slightly before moving toward the left side of the frame and exiting the view. After some time, the individual returns into the frame, bends down, and picks up a container. They proceed to pour its contents onto the floor, creating a noticeable wet patch. The person continues to move around the spilled liquid, seemingly interacting with it, before eventually leaving the area again. The final moments of the footage show a sudden bright flash followed by smoke filling the camera’s field of view, obscuring the scene completely.
yt_arson: Two individuals are seen walking along a paved path at night. One person, wearing a white shirt, walks ahead while the other, in a black shirt, follows behind. The person in the black shirt then moves off the path onto the adjacent grassy area and appears to ignite something, causing a bright flash of light. Shortly after, this individual turns back toward the path and begins running away from the spot where they lit the object. The person in the white shirt continues walking forward without stopping or reacting to the event. The camera then shifts focus to show the aftermath, with flames visibly spreading through nearby vegetation.
